Comment_glosser: baňźn is probably a loan from Tai-Kadai but then the form for 1000 is identical to the native form for 2
baňźn is probably a loan from Tai-Kadai but then the form for 1000 is identical to the native form for 2; also 1000 would then irregularly have a short vowel in this form
